SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Interface IEngine

public interface IEngine
Interface specification for engine features available from an initialized host.
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Build a RuleContext from the current engine state (for persistence).

  • Method Details

    • getCipherSuites

      ICipherSuite[] getCipherSuites() throws DeepVioletException
      Return ciphersuites for the target host. Calls getCipherSuites(CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION) with CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION.IANA as the default.
      Returns:
      Ciphersuites supported by target host.
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - thrown on problems fetching ciphersuites.

    • getSession

      ISession getSession()
      Return session instance for the target host when IEngine was created.
      Returns:
      Session instance for target host.
      See Also:
      • DeepVioletFactory.initializeSession(URL)

    • writeCertificate

      long writeCertificate(String file) throws DeepVioletException
      Write PEM encoded X.509 certificate for the target host when IEngine was created to a fully qualified file name.
      Parameters:
      file - Fully qualified file name
      Returns:
      Returns the number of bytes written to disk
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems writing to the disk.

    • getCertificate

      IX509Certificate getCertificate() throws DeepVioletException
      Retrieve a IX509Certificate.
      Returns:
      Return IX509Certificate representing host associated with IEngine instance.
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems reading certificate.

    • getDeepVioletMajorVersion

      int getDeepVioletMajorVersion()
      Return the Major Version of DeepViolet. Incremented upon significant addition of new features. Existing features could also break code. Callers are urged to test upon implementing new major versions.
      Returns:
      Number indicating DeepViolet Major Version.

    • getDeepVioletMinorVersion

      int getDeepVioletMinorVersion()
      Return the Minor Version of DeepViolet. Incremented upon significant improvement to existing features. Callers are urged to test upon implementing new major versions.
      Returns:
      Number indicating DeepViolet Minor Version.

    • getDeepVioletBuildVersion

      int getDeepVioletBuildVersion()
      Return the Build Version of DeepViolet. Incremented on bug fixes to existing features. It's not anticipated this any improvements will break code. Callers are urged to perform basic unit tests.
      Returns:
      Number indicating DeepViolet Build Version.

    • getDeepVioletStringVersion

      String getDeepVioletStringVersion()
      Return the DeepViolet version string.
      Returns:
      Suitable for printing in log files, displaying in About boxes, etc.

    • isDeepVioletSnapShot

      boolean isDeepVioletSnapShot()
      Return Maven SNAPSHOT release status
      Returns:
      true, DeepViolet is beta status. false, DeepViolet is release status.

    • getTlsFingerprint

      String getTlsFingerprint() throws DeepVioletException
      Compute TLS server fingerprint for the target host.

      TLS server fingerprinting analyzes how a server responds to 10 different ClientHello probes to create a 62-character fingerprint that characterizes the server's TLS selection behavior.

      What Fingerprints Identify

      • Server's cipher selection behavior
      • Extension ordering in responses
      • TLS version negotiation patterns
      • Deployment-specific configuration

      What Fingerprints Do NOT Identify

      • Specific software (nginx, Apache, etc.)
      • Software version
      • Underlying OS

      Technique inspired by Salesforce's JARM.

      Returns:
      62-character TLS fingerprint, or null if unavailable
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems computing fingerprint
      See Also:
      • TlsServerFingerprint

    • getSCTs

      List<byte[]> getSCTs() throws DeepVioletException
      Get Signed Certificate Timestamps (SCTs) from the TLS connection. SCTs can come from three sources: 1. TLS extension in ServerHello 2. X.509 certificate extension 3. OCSP stapled response
      Returns:
      List of raw SCT bytes from all sources, empty list if none found
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems extracting SCTs

    • getTlsMetadata

      TlsMetadata getTlsMetadata() throws DeepVioletException
      Get detailed TLS metadata from the connection using raw TLS parsing. This provides access to full ServerHello extensions, fingerprint codes, etc.
      Returns:
      TLS metadata, or null if raw parsing was not performed
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems getting metadata

    • getFallbackScsvSupported

      Boolean getFallbackScsvSupported() throws DeepVioletException
      Test whether the server supports TLS_FALLBACK_SCSV (RFC 7507).
      Returns:
      true if SCSV is supported, false if not, null if test was inconclusive
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems performing the test

    • getDnsStatus

      IDnsStatus getDnsStatus() throws DeepVioletException
      Get DNS security status for the target host. Checks for CAA and DANE/TLSA records.
      Returns:
      DNS security status, or null if check was not performed
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems checking DNS

    • buildRuleContext

      RuleContext buildRuleContext() throws DeepVioletException
      Build a RuleContext from the current engine state (for persistence). The returned context can be serialized and later used for offline re-scoring without re-scanning.
      Returns:
      RuleContext snapshot of the current engine state
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems building the context

    • getRiskScore

      IRiskScore getRiskScore(RuleContext context) throws DeepVioletException
      Compute risk score from a pre-built RuleContext (offline re-scoring). Uses the default bundled scoring policy.
      Parameters:
      context - pre-built or deserialized RuleContext
      Returns:
      Risk score with per-category breakdowns and letter grade
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems computing score

    • getRiskScore

      IRiskScore getRiskScore(RuleContext context, InputStream userRulesStream) throws DeepVioletException
      Compute risk score from a pre-built RuleContext with user rules merged into the system policy.
      Parameters:
      context - pre-built or deserialized RuleContext
      userRulesStream - InputStream containing user rules YAML
      Returns:
      Risk score with per-category breakdowns and letter grade
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems computing score

    • getRiskScore

      IRiskScore getRiskScore() throws DeepVioletException
      Compute a TLS risk score using the default bundled scoring policy. Evaluates 6 categories (protocols, ciphers, certificate, revocation, security headers, other) totaling 100 points.
      Returns:
      Risk score with per-category breakdowns and letter grade
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems computing score

    • getRiskScore

      IRiskScore getRiskScore(String rulesPath) throws DeepVioletException
      Compute a TLS risk score using a custom YAML rules file.
      Parameters:
      rulesPath - Path to custom risk-scoring-rules.yaml file
      Returns:
      Risk score with per-category breakdowns and letter grade
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems computing score

    • getRiskScore

      IRiskScore getRiskScore(InputStream userRulesStream) throws DeepVioletException
      Compute risk score using the default system rules merged with user-defined rules from the given stream. The stream should contain only categories with USR- prefixed rule IDs.
      Parameters:
      userRulesStream - InputStream containing user rules YAML
      Returns:
      Risk score with per-category breakdowns and letter grade
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems computing score

    • getAiAnalysis

      String getAiAnalysis(AiConfig config) throws DeepVioletException
      Analyze the current TLS scan results using an AI provider. Builds a plain text report from the engine state and sends it as an InputStream to the AI service.
      Parameters:
      config - AI configuration
      Returns:
      AI analysis text
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on scan data or AI errors

    • getAiAnalysis

      String getAiAnalysis(InputStream scanReport, AiConfig config) throws DeepVioletException
      Analyze scan data from a caller-provided stream using an AI provider. The caller controls the data source — file, URL, in-memory buffer, etc.
      Parameters:
      scanReport - InputStream providing the plain text scan report
      config - AI configuration
      Returns:
      AI analysis text
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on AI errors
